summary: Retested the rebuilt Landed Cost Calculator (/calculator) end-to-end. Backend POST /api/calculator/landed-cost works with the new schema (product_name, category, product_value, quantity, weight_kg, origin, destination, selling_price). Frontend renders the calc-result card with Total Landed Cost, per-unit cost, CIF and a full breakdown (Goods Value, Freight Estimate, Insurance, Customs Duty %, GST). Projected Margin section shows because selling_price is provided. Category change (Spices -> Textiles & Apparel) bumps duty_rate from 4.0% -> 10.0% and total from $17,476 -> $18,484. Destination change (Sydney -> Perth) bumps freight from $3,200 -> $3,840 and total to $18,212. No console errors, no React error overlay.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py: landed-cost handler is clean — categorised duty, weight-driven freight (min floor $150), 0.5% insurance, CIF, duty, GST. No _id leakage. Good.

LandedCost.jsx: parseFloat(e.target.value) || 0 will silently coerce empty input to 0; for quantity=0 the backend divides per_unit=0 (guarded), but UI should probably block submit if quantity<=0. Non-blocking nit.
LandedCost.jsx: error path catches everything and shows a generic message; consider surfacing axios response details in dev. Non-blocking.
Field.jsx SelectField: native <select> works correctly with Playwright select_option — good testability decision.
Backend pytest still uses deprecated @app.on_event startup handler (pre-existing from earlier iterations) — migrate to FastAPI lifespan when convenient.
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_imex_backend.py (replaced obsolete test_landed_cost with three new tests covering defaults, category-change-duty, destination-change-freight against the new schema)

success_rate.backend: 100% (9/9 in scope; landed cost: 4/4 new tests)

seed_data_creation: None. Used prefilled defaults (Organic Turmeric Powder / Spices & Wellness / 12 / 1000 / 800kg / Mumbai -> Sydney / $28).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Landed Cost Calculator is verified at 1920x800. Defaults yield total $17,476 (CIF $15,276, duty 4% $611, GST 10% $1,589), per-unit $17, Projected Margin 37.6% with $10,524 total profit. Selecting Textiles & Apparel correctly switches duty to 10% ($1,528) and total $18,484. Selecting Perth, AU correctly switches freight to $3,840 (800kg * $4.8/kg) and total $18,212. Other pages (Dashboard, Import vs Local, Profit Mode, Opportunity Scanner, AI Assistant) were already validated in iterations 1 and 2 and were out of scope for this retest.
rca of the issue: The original 'no results' bug was fixed by E1 prior to this iteration: backend POST /api/calculator/landed-cost now accepts the new minimal schema (product_value, quantity, weight_kg, category, destination) and computes duty from CATEGORY_DUTY map and freight from DEST_FREIGHT_RATE map; LandedCost.jsx calls calcLandedCost(form), setResult(r) and renders [data-testid=calc-result]. Confirmed working in UI.
